sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, angle Float32, description String);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, angle, description) VALUES (1, 0.0, 'Zero angle'), (2, PI()/4, 'Pi over 4'), (3, 1.5708, 'Pi over 2'), (4, NULL, 'NULL angle'), (5, -1.0, 'Negative angle');
SELECT id, angle, tan(angle) AS tangent_value FROM test_table WHERE tan(angle) ILIKE '%0%' OR description ILIKE '%angle%';
SELECT id, angle, tan(tan(angle)) AS double_tangent FROM test_table HAVING double_tangent ILIKE '%1%';
SELECT a.id, a.angle, b.id, b.angle FROM test_table AS a JOIN test_table AS b ON a.angle = tan(b.angle) WHERE b.description ILIKE 'Negative%';
SELECT id, angle FROM (SELECT id, angle, tan(angle) AS tangent_value FROM test_table WHERE angle IS NOT NULL) AS derived_table WHERE tangent_value > 0.5;
SELECT id, angle FROM test_table WHERE angle IN (SELECT tan(angle) FROM test_table WHERE angle IS NOT NULL);
WITH extreme_float AS (SELECT id, tan(angle) AS tangent FROM test_table WHERE angle IS NOT NULL) SELECT AVG(tangent) AS average_tangent FROM extreme_float GROUP BY id HAVING average_tangent > 1;
ALTER TABLE test_table ADD COLUMN angle_description String;
UPDATE test_table SET angle_description = CASE WHEN angle IS NULL THEN 'No angle' ELSE 'Valid angle' END;
